text: Get the daily count of alert, anomaly and work order event for the May 2020 for equipment CWC04009.

tasks.task_description: Fetch historical data for equipment CWC04009 for May 2020
tasks.review: Task Status: Not Accomplished | identified incorrect site for CWC04009, check other resources.
